summary: Completely redesigned the Vijdon Taxi admin panel. Views were rewritten to add inline order status/driver assignment, search & filter on every list page, and delete actions for orders, drivers, and clients. URLs were extended with new routes for status update, delete, and driver toggle. All 5 templates were rebuilt with a cleaner Tailwind UI: a sidebar with active state, a glass header, stat cards on the dashboard, card-grid layout for drivers, a full-featured orders table with inline dropdowns, search bars, and empty-state illustrations. A context processor (taxi.context_processors.active_drivers) was added so the 'New Order' modal in base.html always has the driver list available on every page. Django system check passed with 0 issues.
current_status: Project is fully functional: models and migrations unchanged, 3 new views (order_update_status, order_delete, driver_delete, driver_toggle_active, client_delete), all templates modernised, context processor registered. Ready to run with: venv/bin/python manage.py runserver
